summary: Split Preview Panel feature testing completed. Backend: 11/12 tests passed (92%). Frontend: All UI elements verified working. The Split Preview panel correctly displays for multi-page documents with batch_detected=true, shows '3 DOCUMENTS DETECTED' badge, renders color-coded page thumbnails, scissor boundary markers, group summaries with vendor hints and reference numbers, and 'Split into 3 docs' button.

minor.issue: Endpoint times out (>30s) when actually splitting - this is expected behavior for long-running AI classification on each child document

seed_data_creation: Test document 'test-multipage-split' already existed with 5-page PDF containing 3 logical documents
